what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that links attachment att-75554095 in channel dragnet-development to board item item-43ee78e4, with an added timestamp.
observations: The file consists only of YAML front matter with no body content.
It declares an attachment_type of board_items and a target using a board:// URI scheme.
The channel is dragnet-development and the attachment id is att-75554095.
standouts: board_items attachment_type targeting a board:// URI
Empty body beyond the metadata front matter
conventions: Uses YAML front matter inside a Markdown file for structured metadata.
References an external entity via a custom board:// URI scheme.
concerns: The file contains no descriptive content, so the meaning of the attachment depends entirely on the external board item.
notes: A bare channel-attachment ledger stub that points a board item to a channel attachment.
questions: What artifact or content does attachment att-75554095 represent?
What is the role or content of board item item-43ee78e4?
Is the board_items type intended for pinning, indexing, or threading context?
purpose_vs_actual: Its implicit purpose is to record a link between a channel attachment and a board item, and its content does exactly that.
apparent_themes: Cross-reference between attachments and board items
intention_signals: It appears designed to create a persistent, discoverable association between a channel attachment and a specific board item for later retrieval or context threading.
contribution: Provides a precise, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a board item that a fused system could use to reconstruct cross-entity references.
summary_for_embedding: A Markdown metadata stub recording that channel dragnet-development attachment att-75554095 of type board_items targets board item item-43ee78e4, created on 2026-06-24.
